title: Banana Pickle Bliss
description: A fermented, gooey, low-calorie-friendly Norwegian dish featuring banana and pickle.

ingredients.name: pickled cucumber
ingredients.notes: optional, use fresh pickles if unavailable

instructions: Peel and dice the bananas into small chunks.
Combine banana chunks with pickled cucumber, lime juice, ginger paste, vinegar, and salt in a mixing bowl. Mix well to combine all ingredients.
Let the mixture sit at room temperature for 30 minutes before serving.
Serve chilled as a snack or appetizer.
